signals.headline: Republican-controlled House votes down war powers resolution ordering Trump to end Iran war by 1 vote** | NO | HIGH conf
signals.raw:
Republican-controlled House votes down war powers resolution ordering Trump to end Iran war by 1 vote** | NO | HIGH confidence[1][2]

The House rejection, largely along party lines with only Rep. Thomas Massie (R-KY) crossing over, occurred Thursday (April 17, 2026), following a similar Senate failure; Democrats vow weekly votes, potentially pressuring Republicans as the conflict nears the 60-day

signals.headline: South Korea's annual inflation rose to 2
signals.raw:
South Korea's annual inflation rose to 2.2% in March 2026 (up from 2.0% prior), missing forecasts of 2.4% | NO | MED confidence**[1]

This March figure—latest available as of early April 2026 updates—shows contained pressures amid Middle East energy shocks, aligning with Bank of Korea's 2.2% yearly outlook after holding rates at 2.5% (7th meeting, ~Apr 10 announcement)**[1][3]. No newer April data
